summary: Add new Reporting menu (separate from Reports). Super admins author SELECT-only SQL queries; super admins and helpdesk technicians run them from the Reporting page; results export to CSV/JSON/XML/PDF. New /admin/reporting page lets super admins create/edit/delete queries and grant per-user access. Seeds three sample queries: Unbilled Tickets, Tech Billable vs Non-Billable Time Per Day, and Count of Assets Per Company.
